title: adonis vernalis var. villosa
intro: Adonis vernalis var. villosa, also known as the hairy Adonis or false hellebore, is a plant species within the buttercup family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Adonis vernalis var. villosa can be prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
